name: Unicorn Print Rectangular Table Cover - Spritz™
description:
Get your table ready for your next party with this Unicorn Print Rectangular Table Cover from Spritz™. This table cover offers you a base to set the table for your kids’ parties while ensuring your table stays protected from spills or stains. With simplistic unicorn prints all over, this table cover adds a pop of fun to your celebrations. Pair it with colorful dinnerware, tableware and napkins to create an elegant display.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
